audit_items.proof_trace: pqsort.c contains zero calls to malloc, calloc, realloc, or free — confirmed by exhaustive grep. All four functions (swapfunc, med3, _pqsort, pqsort) perform purely pointer-arithmetic operations on a caller-provided array. The property's universal quantification over free() calls ranges over an empty set, making it vacuously true; no use-after-free or double-free is possible.
